description.english: Defeat the Mad Gardener in the Black Forest.
description.schinese: 在黑森林中击败疯狂的园丁。
description.tchinese: 在黑森林中擊敗瘋狂的園丁。

description.english: Defeat the Forest Guardian in the Black Forest.
description.schinese: 在黑森林中击败木灵守护者。
description.tchinese: 在黑森林中擊敗木靈守護者。

description.english: Defeat the Goblin Champion in the Black Forest.
description.schinese: 在黑森林中击败哥布林第一勇士。
description.tchinese: 在黑森林中擊敗哥布林第一勇士。

description.english: Defeat the Mutated Priest in the Ruined Cemetery.
description.schinese: 在荒废墓园中击败变异的神甫。
description.tchinese: 在荒廢墓園中擊敗變異的神甫。

description.english: Defeat the Last Guardian in the Ruined Cemetery.
description.schinese: 在荒废墓园中击败最后的守卫。
description.tchinese: 在荒廢墓園中擊敗最後的守衛。

displayName.english: Twin Fiends of the Ruined Village

description.english: Defeat “Alchemist” Eugene and “Mad Dog” Bobby in the Abandoned Cemetery.
description.schinese: 在荒废墓园中击败“炼金术士”尤金与“恶犬”波比。
description.tchinese: 在荒廢墓園中擊敗“煉金術士”尤金與“惡犬”波比。

description.english: Defeat the Crystal Devourer in the Crystal Mountain.
description.schinese: 在结晶山中击败水晶吞噬者。
description.tchinese: 在結晶山中擊敗水晶吞噬者。

description.english: Defeat the Behemoth in the Crystal Mountain.
description.schinese: 在结晶山中击败岩石巨兽
description.tchinese: 在結晶山中擊敗岩石巨獸

description.english: Defeat the Angry Thunder Spirit in the Crystal Mountain.
description.schinese: 在结晶山中击败愤怒的雷精灵
description.tchinese: 在結晶山中擊敗憤怒的雷精靈

description.english: Defeat the Wandering Knight at the Castle Bridge.
description.schinese: 在城堡塔桥中击败流浪骑士。
description.tchinese: 在城堡塔橋中擊敗流浪騎士。

description.english: Defeat Steward the Demon Sealer in the Black Castle.
description.schinese: 在黑城堡中击败封印恶魔的管家。
description.tchinese: 在黑城堡中擊敗封印惡魔的管家。

description.english: Collect and record 20 different treasures during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录20种不同宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄20種不同寶藏。

description.english: Collect and record 50 different treasures during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录50种不同宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄50種不同寶藏。

description.english: Collect and record 100 different treasures during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录100种不同宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄100種不同寶藏。

description.english: Collect and record 20 different weapons during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录20种不同的武器。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄20種不同的武器。

description.english: Collect and record 50 different weapons during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录50种不同的武器。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄50種不同的武器。

description.english: Collect and record 100 different weapons during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录100种不同的武器。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄100種不同的武器。

description.english: Start an adventure in online multiplayer mode.
description.schinese: 在联网多人模式下开始一次冒险。
description.tchinese: 在聯網多人模式下開始一次冒險。

description.english: Start an adventure in online multiplayer mode.
description.schinese: 在联网多人模式下开始一次冒险。
description.tchinese: 在聯網多人模式下開始一次冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Two-handed Weapons.
description.schinese: 使用双手武器完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用雙手武器完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Single-handed weapon.
description.schinese: 使用单手武器完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用單手武器完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Staff.
description.schinese: 使用法杖完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用法杖完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Dual-Blades.
description.schinese: 使用双刀完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用雙刀完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Bow.
description.schinese: 使用弓箭完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用弓箭完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Turbo Lance.
description.schinese: 使用涡炉枪完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用渦爐槍完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Enter the camp for the first time.
description.schinese: 第一次进入营地。
description.tchinese: 第一次進入營地。

description.english: Nia arrives at the Treasure Hunter's camp.
description.schinese: 尼娅来到了宝藏猎人的营地。
description.tchinese: 尼婭來到了寶藏獵人的營地。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Musket.
description.schinese: 使用火枪完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用火槍完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Phantom Lantern.
description.schinese: 使用幽影提灯完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用幽影提燈完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: First enter the Castle Dungeon.
description.schinese: 首次进入城堡地牢。
description.tchinese: 首次進入城堡地牢。

description.english: Collect and record all monsters during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录所有怪物。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄所有怪物。

description.english: Recruit Raven as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募雷文作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募雷文作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Collect and record 200 different treasures during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录200种不同宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄200種不同寶藏。

description.english: Collect and record 285 different treasures during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录285种不同宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄285種不同寶藏。

description.english: Collect and record 200 different weapons during your adventure.
description.schinese: 在冒险中收集并记录200种不同的武器。
description.tchinese: 在冒險中收集並記錄200種不同的武器。

description.english: Purchase a total of 50 ornaments from the black market merchant in the camp.
description.schinese: 在营地的黑市商人处累计购买50个装饰品。
description.tchinese: 在營地的黑市商人處累計購買50個裝飾品。

description.english: Purchase all KO treasures from the goblin merchant in the camp.
description.schinese: 在营地的黑市商人处购买过全部赝品。
description.tchinese: 在營地的黑市商人處購買過全部贗品。

description.english: Defeat the Treasure Anglerfish in the Saltpeter Desert.
description.schinese: 在硝石荒漠中击败宝藏鮟鱇。
description.tchinese: 在硝石荒漠中擊敗寶藏鮟鱇。

description.english: Defeat the Source of the Nightmare in the Mage Tower.
description.schinese: 在法师塔中击败噩梦之源。
description.tchinese: 在法師塔中擊敗噩夢之源。

description.english:
Defeat The Deceitful Chaos God in the Mage Tower.
- Forge a sharp edge with the will of many, and cut through falsehoods with an oath of unity.
description.schinese:
在法师塔中击败诡谲之主。
“以众人之志凝作锋芒，以同心之誓斩破虚妄。”
description.tchinese:
在法師塔中擊敗詭譎之主。
“以眾人之志凝作鋒芒，以同心之誓斬破虛妄。”

description.english: Defeat Lord Alfred in the Mage Tower.
description.schinese: 在法师塔中击败领主艾弗雷德。
description.tchinese: 在法師塔中擊敗領主艾弗雷德。

description.english: Defeat the Phantom of the Lost Swordsman in the Frozen Cave.
description.schinese: 在冰窖洞窟中击失落剑客的幽影。
description.tchinese: 在冰窖洞窟中擊失落劍客的幽影。

description.english: Defeat the Frost Colossus in the Frozen Cave.
description.schinese: 在冰窖洞窟中击败坚冰巨像。
description.tchinese: 在冰窖洞窟中擊敗堅冰巨像。

description.english: Defeat the “Captain” in the Saltpeter Desert.
description.schinese: 在硝石荒漠中击败“船长”。
description.tchinese: 在硝石荒漠中擊敗“船長”。

description.english: Defeat A Mysterious Shadow in the Castle Dungeon.
description.schinese: 在城堡地牢中击败神秘的幻影。
description.tchinese: 在城堡地牢中擊敗神秘的幻影。

description.english: Defeat the Nightmare Maid at the Castle Bridge.
description.schinese: 在城堡塔桥中击败噩梦女仆。
description.tchinese: 在城堡塔橋中擊敗噩夢女僕。

description.english: Defeat the Frenzy Fishiod Shaman in the Mudfish Swamp.
description.schinese: 在泥鱼沼泽中击败狂热鱼人萨满。
description.tchinese: 在泥魚沼澤中擊敗狂熱魚人薩滿。

description.english: Defeat the Giant Hunterspider Queen in the Mudfish Swamp.
description.schinese: 在泥鱼沼泽中击败巨后猎蛛。
description.tchinese: 在泥魚沼澤中擊敗巨後獵蛛。

description.english: Defeat the Warden in the Castle Dungeon.
description.schinese: 在城堡地牢中击败典狱长。
description.tchinese: 在城堡地牢中擊敗典獄長。

description.english:
Collect all 6 Fire Dragon Souls in one successful adventure.
- That was a really long detour.
description.schinese:
在一次成功冒险中，收集齐6个火龙魂。
“真的是绕了好大一圈远路啊。”
description.tchinese:
在一次成功冒險中，收集齊6個火龍魂。
“真的是繞了好大一圈遠路啊。”

description.english: Upgrade the Alchemist's Hut in the camp to the maximum level.
description.schinese: 把营地的炼金术师小屋升级到最高等级。
description.tchinese: 把營地的煉金術師小屋升級到最高等級。

description.english: Upgrade the Blacksmith in the camp to the maximum level.
description.schinese: 把营地的铁匠铺升级到最高等级。
description.tchinese: 把營地的鐵匠鋪升級到最高等級。

description.english: Recruit Blazeley as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募布莱泽利作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募布萊澤利作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Successfully open the gate of the Black Castle.
description.schinese: 成功打开黑城堡大门。
description.tchinese: 成功打開黑城堡大門。

description.english: If you want it, come and get it yourself. You’ve known the rule for a long time.
description.schinese: 想要的话，就得自己来拿，你早就懂这个规矩了。
description.tchinese: 想要的話，就得自己來拿，你早就懂這個規矩了。

description.english: First enter the Saltpeter Desert.
description.schinese: 首次进入硝石荒漠。
description.tchinese: 首次進入硝石荒漠。

description.english: Recruit Seren as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募瑟林作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募瑟林作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Equip 3 Alchemy Charms at the same time and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 同时装备3个炼金护符，完成一次成功冒险
description.tchinese: 同時裝備3個煉金護符，完成一次成功冒險

description.english: Obtain a Level 6 Soulstone.
description.schinese: 获得一个6级灵魂石。
description.tchinese: 獲得一個6級靈魂石。

description.english: First enter the Frozen Cave.
description.schinese: 首次进入冰窖洞窟。
description.tchinese: 首次進入冰窖洞窟。

description.english: Recruit Shadow as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募玄影作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募玄影作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Perform soulstone smelting for the first time at Nia's.
description.schinese: 在尼娅处首次进行灵魂石熔炼。
description.tchinese: 在尼婭處首次進行靈魂石熔煉。

description.english: Unlock 18 Soul Seals.
description.schinese: 解锁18个灵魂刻印。
description.tchinese: 解鎖18個靈魂刻印。

description.english: Activate the resonance of all Soul Seals.
description.schinese: 激活全部灵魂刻印的共鸣。
description.tchinese: 啟動全部靈魂刻印的共鳴。

description.english: First enter the Mudfish Swamp.
description.schinese: 首次进入泥雨沼泽。
description.tchinese: 首次進入泥雨沼澤。

description.english: Recruit Navarre as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募纳瓦尔作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募納瓦爾作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Obtain a Level 5 Soulstone.
description.schinese: 获得一个5级灵魂石。
description.tchinese: 獲得一個5級靈魂石。

description.english: Carry 5 curses and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 携带5个诅咒，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 攜帶5個詛咒，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Perform soulstone fusion for the first time at Nia's.
description.schinese: 在尼娅处首次进行灵魂石融合。
description.tchinese: 在尼婭處首次進行靈魂石融合。

description.english: Collect all memory fragments.
description.schinese: 集齐所有记忆碎片。
description.tchinese: 集齊所有記憶碎片。

description.english: Synthesize a legendary treasure in one successful adventure.
description.schinese: 在一次成功的冒险中，合成一个传奇宝藏。
description.tchinese: 在一次成功的冒險中，合成一個傳奇寶藏。

description.english: Achieve your first great success during soulstone fusion.
description.schinese: 在进行灵魂石融合时，首次大成功。
description.tchinese: 在進行靈魂石融合時，首次大成功。

description.english: Activate the full resonance of one Soul Seal.
description.schinese: 激活一个灵魂刻印的全部共鸣。
description.tchinese: 啟動一個靈魂刻印的全部共鳴。

description.english: Obtain a Level 7 Soulstone.
description.schinese: 获得一个7级灵魂石。
description.tchinese: 獲得一個7級靈魂石。

description.english: Upgrade the Expedition Camp to the maximum level at Armstrong's.
description.schinese: 在阿姆斯特朗处将探险团营地升到最高等级。
description.tchinese: 在阿姆斯特朗處將探險團營地升到最高等級。

description.english: First enter the hidden area of the Mage Tower.
description.schinese: 首次进入法师塔隐藏场景。
description.tchinese: 首次進入法師塔隱藏場景。

description.english: Recruit Kasumi as a companion and complete a successful adventure.
description.schinese: 招募霞作为伙伴，完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 招募霞作為夥伴，完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Unlock 27 Soul Seals.
description.schinese: 解锁27个灵魂刻印。
description.tchinese: 解鎖27個靈魂刻印。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Nightmare difficulty 1.
description.schinese: 在噩梦1难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在噩夢1難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Nightmare difficulty 2.
description.schinese: 在噩梦2难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在噩夢2難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Nightmare difficulty 3.
description.schinese: 在噩梦3难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在噩夢3難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Nightmare difficulty 4.
description.schinese: 在噩梦4难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在噩夢4難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Nightmare difficulty 5.
description.schinese: 在噩梦5难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在噩夢5難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure on Normal difficulty.
description.schinese: 在普通难度下完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 在普通難度下完成一次成功冒險。

description.english: Complete a successful adventure using Katana.
description.schinese: 使用太刀完成一次成功冒险。
description.tchinese: 使用太刀完成一次成功冒險。
